title: lovoa trichilioides
intro: Lovoa trichilioides, also known as the African mahogany or Lovoa tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Lovoa trichilioides include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lovoa trichilioides include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. The herbal preparations of Lovoa trichilioides include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which are made from the bark, leaves, and roots of the plant.
